pageContext.name: Yoda 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Now you can own a delightful pure silver Chibi® Coin for Yoda™! Our Star Wars™ Chibi Coin Collection continues by celebrating this fan favorite, who first appeared in the 1980's film Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back.  Made from 1oz of pure silver, the coin has been shaped and colored to resemble Yoda™ as Chibi art. Only 2,000 of these adorable coins will be minted.  As a verified limited-edition collectible there is a Certificate of Authenticity printed on the box along with confirmation of the coin's unique number in the mintage. The large window in the box allows this precious collectible to be easily displayed.   Add this Chibi® Coin to your collection now. He may be small but he's important!
